analyzers.title: Source Generators & Analyzers
analyzers.description: EasyValidate uses Roslyn source generators to create fast, reflection-free validation code at compile time. Analyzers ensure correct attribute usage and provide IDE feedback.

contributing.title: Contributing
contributing.description: Pull requests and issues are welcome! To contribute:

extending.title: Extending EasyValidate
extending.description: You can create your own validation attributes by inheriting from the appropriate base class:

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: EasyValidate is a modern, fast, and extensible attribute-based validation library for .NET. It features source generators, analyzers, and a rich set of ready-to-use validation attributes for strings, numbers, dates, and collections.

localization.title: Localization
localization.description: All error messages in EasyValidate are localization-ready. Use resource files or custom formatters for multi-language support.

quickstart.title: Quick Start
quickstart.description: See Attributes Reference for all available validation attributes.
